rationale: The citing article is a conceptual commentary that explicitly reinterprets and critiques core regulatory-fit evidence from Avnet and Higgins (2006), including examples and claims about the origin of “feeling right.” The citing note states it draws on prior experimental evidence from Avnet and Higgins (2006) and challenges whether their fit effect is unique versus a broader multifinality/progress account, indicating substantive theoretical use rather than incidental mention.
